transcript.text:
I came to 'LOTTERIA' to eat burgers
I have a schedule planned after this
so I'm just gonna eat lightly
(Lightly...)
(Her definition of 'light' is very different....!)
('LOTTERIA')
(Lightly)
(Shake it up)
(Mozzarella In The Burger, Korean Beef Bulgogi Burger, Bulgogi 4DX, Hot Crispy Burger)
(Bulgogi Burger, Shrimp Burger, Teriyaki Burger, Chicken Burger)
(So, how many is light...?)
(Total number of burgers is ***?!?)
(A light mukbang starts now!) I'll stop now, that was light!
Hello, everyone!
You know where
I am right now?

I came to
'LOTTERIA' for burgers!
Ta-da! 'LOTTERIA'
Burgers are different based on each brand, right?
I felt like eating 'LOTTERIA' so I came to eat them!
My favorite thing in 'LOTTERIA' is
seasoned fries!
I liked it so much since I was little
Really...
I used to eat 4-5 seasoned fries all the time...
(Let's go) I'll go in now!
(Entering the building)
(Let's order them!) I'll order first
I have to add bacon in Mozzarella In The Burger
(Butter flavored moist buns) What are the butter buns? I've never seen this before!
Shall I try it?

(+ Butter buns)
Korean Beef Bulgogi as well!
(Bulgogi 4DX + butter buns)
(Plant-based new dishes) There are many new ones! Ria Miracle? What is this?
Hot Crispy Burger as well!
I want Bulgogi Burger
5 of them!
I want Shrimp Burger as well!
Just two
I want 3 Teriyaki Burgers
Should I get Chicken Burger as well?
(11 burgers for eating lightly..?) It's 11 total, 11 burgers
(I have to order sides as well) Squid Ring
Seasoned fries!
Chili!
Seasoned fries onion!

Cheese sticks as well!
(Done with ordering) I'll start with them for now
I'll order more later if it's not enough
I forgot to order drinks!
(Ordered 1 Iced tea, 3 Coke!)
(Busy busy)
(A few moments later...)
#136 customer!
(It's ready) Your order is ready!
(Excited)
(So much) Wow, amazing!
(It's heavy...)
(Picked up drinks as well!)
Wow, so many burgers here!!!
(Today's light(?) order is finally here!)
First of all, it smells so good!

How should I say this? The oil smell?
(She's going crazy because she's excited)
I'm so pumped!
It's nothing huge but...
I'm a branch manager here
I don't have much to offer
but this is an exchange coupon
Oh! Really?
(A surprise gift for the visit...!) This is for all the branches!
- I can use it anywhere? - Yes, you can use it for delivery as well
- Thank you so much! - You're welcome!
Wow!!!
This is amazing!!!
(Not just a single item, it's a set coupon!) Shrimp Burger set! Cheese Burger set!
Thank you!!
(My pleasure)

Wait, firstly
I should mix the seasoned fries first!
I...
(Doubled up) I like them so much so I always add two packs for each
You can get extra these days!
I...
I like chili and onion!
Cheese is...
(Others are too good) good but I like chili and onion better!
I add two packs like this!
Wow, it's gonna be so delicious!
Um
(It'll be catastrophic if you inhale...) You shouldn't inhale through your nose when you do this
(Shake shake)
(Shaky cheeks)
Why are you so serious? LOL

I'm excited to eat them in store after a long time
It's super tasty in store
because it's just made!
The one before was chili
and this is onion!
(Shake it)
(It looks like she's having a ceremony...)
(Shaking is done) It's ready
It's so good!
It's much better in store!
It's the best!
I have to start with Mozzarella In The Burger first!
(Before the cheese gets hard!) The mozzarella inside will cool down!
Let me have one bite of this first
It's so tasty!
Honestly, 'LOTTERIA' has the best cheese sticks!

(Mozzarella In The Burger + bacon)
Look at the cheese!
(It's falling out) The cheese burst!
It's yum!
It's so savory
and the bacon flavor is strong
and
everything is very synchronized!
It's so good!
The salty mozzarella cheese taste is
really...
How should I describe it?
The burger itself is very savory and salty
so it's yummy!
Squid Ring is a must at LOTTERIA
(Crispy)

What is this Jambalaya sauce?
It's good!
(Eating the seasoned fries in between!)
This!
This is Korean Beef Bulgogi Burger!
This is like
a signature burger..
of 'LOTTERIA'
It's a signature burger!
When you compare this
to the normal bulgogi burger patty,
(Dominating tenderness) it's so much tender, the patty just melts in the mouth
It's much juicier as well
The sauce is slightly different as well!
It's like..
a bit spicier?

It's like extra spiciness added in the sweet bulgogi sauce
('LOTTERIA' started in 1979...?) Then how long has it been?
There is...
a way to unwrap this
(If you rip it like this, it won't get on your hands!)
Ta-da!
(Shrimp Burger)
LOTTERIA's Shrimp Burger is very famous
(You know it very well)
This 'LOTTERIA' Shrimp Burger
tastes very familiar
(Familiarity that you can never forget...!) It's not like 'Wow! It's so good!', but it's rather very familiar!
I sometimes miss this taste!
It's strange but it's so good!
Since I ordered 3 Teriyaki Burgers,
it's time to eat one now!

This is my favorite
(Excited) I can't wait!
How should I say this?
The harmony between mayo and bulgogi sauce is
definitely the best
(Teriyaki Burger)
The sauce is unbelievable...
(Thumbs up)
(Tzuyang's taste!) I like the combination between mayo and bulgogi sauce
It's perfect for my taste!
This time...
(Determined) I should try Hot Crispy Burger, right?
(Hot Crispy Burger)
It's good!
I'm not sure if it's chicken breast or something else
but it's so tender...

This part of the meat can be tough
but it's very tender
and I can feel the layers of the meat
It's spicy as well
Can you see this?
(Juicy..!) I can see the juice of the meat like this
Is this why it's so tender?
The next one is
one Bulgogi Burger out of two!
(Bulgogi Burger)
(It tastes the same with Teriyaki Burger..) But it's very similar to Teriyaki Burger
Does it just have a bigger patty? What's the difference?
(Searching up) Bulgogi... Teriyaki Burger
(Eureka)
Bulgogi Burger uses bulgogi sauce
and Teriyaki Burger uses teriyaki sauce

Did you guys know?
- PD, did you know it? - I didn't know that
(Excited to find someone who can relate!) You didn't, right?
I wonder which one will be better
(Can feel the difference now!) It's completely different!
Wait, let me compare them again
Oh, even the color of the sauce is different
(L. Bulgogi Burger / R. Teriyaki Burger) Bulgogi Burger is brown and Teriyaki is darker brown!
It's completely different!
Actually, Bulgogi Burger feels more classic!
Teriyaki Burger feels more light and simple
But I can't tell
(Impossible to compare) which one is better
(I like it)
This is definitely my childhood food!
This 'LOTTERIA' fries are like...

it makes..
it makes me think
(The memory of 'LOTTERIA' everyone must have) of my childhood memoires
(The memory of 'LOTTERIA' everyone must have) It was my favorite!
(Midpoint check) Burger 1, 2
(4 burgers left)
This is 4XD(?)
(It says 4DX though...?)
(Bulgogi 4DX)
It has bulgogi inside
(Real bulgogi is here..!) It has bulgogi on the patty!
It's not only bulgogi by word
It has real bulgogi!
The buns
are like
butter-grilled squid..?

How should I say?
(Ordered butter buns for Bulgogi 4DX) I was wondering about this butter smell, but it was the buns!
It's like...
It's like... Um...
It's like... Um... Um...
It's hard to explain...
It smells very familiar
Familiar smell!
Let me eat Teriyaki Burger to refresh
Teriyaki Burger has...
a strong onion smell!
It has onion
It has a lot of raw onions
Oh, the next is...
Wow!
Chicken Burger!

I'm so excited!
(Chicken Burger) I crave it sometimes
It'll be different if you have it every day
(Very simple chicken burger) but it's amazing once in a while
It's very cheap, right ?
Usually for chicken burger, they use mayo sauce
but they also have
('LOTTERIA' Chicken Burger uses teriyaki sauce) teriyaki sauce as well!
(Non-stop eating the fries)
(Coke refill) Thank you
I feel like
when I was in high school,
('LOTTERIA' was a afterschool hangout place!) I used to go to LOTTERIA after school all the time
(Even now, students come here after school!) Just like how we spend our time at a café these days
(Last one already...)
The best burger among the all was

(Today's best) Mozzarella In The Burger and Korean Beef Burger
These two were the best!
I can't pick one from them...LOL
(Coke refill) Thank you!
(Cleared the 11th one!)
(It was here.. but now it's gone...)
I'll stop here!
I enjoyed eating today as well
(Today's light mukbang)
(Teriyaki Burger x3, Bulgogi Burger x2, Mozzarella In The Burger w/ bacon, Korean Beef Bulgogi, Bulgogi 4DX, Shrimp Burger)
(Chicken Burger, Seasoned Fries Chili, Seasoned Fries Onion, Cheese Stick, Coke x5, Iced tea)
(11 Burgers, 4 sides, 6 drinks)
